pharma.title: Pharma and healthcare companies to face continued margin pressure: HDFC Securities
pharma.summary: The Indian pharmaceutical and healthcare sector is expected to see moderate revenue growth, with EBITDA margins remaining flat, in the March quarter, according to a brokerage report by HDFC Securities. We project sales/EBITDA growth of 11%/6% YoY for our...

pharma.title: Vaccine gaps fuel Bangladesh's deadly measles crisis
pharma.summary: Rocking her baby to soothe his searing pain and gasping breaths, 18-year-old Rubia Akhtar Brishti recounts how her son nearly died in Bangladesh's deadly measles outbreak. "The boy had (a) high fever and found it hard to breathe,"mopping the fevered brow of...

pharma.title: Reconsider MoU with C-DAC over HIS 2.0, Centre directs PGI

pharma.title: Domestic pharma grew at 8.8% in FY26; Torrent, Cipla surge ahead in the Rs 2.46 lakh crore market
pharma.summary: The Indian domestic pharmaceutical market grew to ₹2.46 lakh crore in FY26, fueled by a 13.6% jump in the cardiac segment and a shift toward high-value GLP-1 diabetes therapies.

pharma.title: German CDMO Adragos acquires major Sanofi sterile injectables plant near Paris | HealthCare Middle East & Africa - No.1 Health & Pharma Manufacturing Industry Publication
pharma.summary: The Maisons-Alfort plant, which previously operated under Sanofi's ownership, specializes in fill-finish manufacturing at commercial scale.

providers.title: SEHA Tawam Hospital debuts histotripsy for non-invasive liver cancer treatment | HealthCare Middle East & Africa - No.1 Health & Pharma Manufacturing Industry Publication
providers.summary: Histotripsy uses precisely focused ultrasound energy to destroy tumours from outside the body, eliminating the need for surgery, radiotherapy, or chemotherapy.
